calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Sheila Quinlan appearing for and with Mr. Tecle. Counsel presented the Court with the original baptismal certificate and an I-94 car. She also explained the circumstances how the documents were obtained. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
